commits: 26383c8: docs(transparency): OBS-log — PLAN memo for mutations/served/attribution record fields
4ca0f93: test(transparency): OBS-log — RED tests for mutations/served/attribution record fields
a9f9c8f: feat(transparency): OBS-log — add mutations/served/attribution to the JSONL request record

blockers_encountered.description: Existing tests pass a bare MagicMock as response_obj (shared conftest mock_response_obj fixture, read-only). attribute_served_backend reads response._hidden_params expecting a dict; on a MagicMock it auto-creates a truthy MagicMock so hp.get('api_base') returns a MagicMock and urlsplit(...) raises, breaking 9 pre-existing tests. conftest.py and transparency.py are DO-NOT-TOUCH.
blockers_encountered.resolution: Wrapped the attribute_served_backend call in _build_record in a try/except that logs at debug and falls back to served=None / attribution='inferred'. A logging callback must never crash the record build; real litellm responses always carry a dict _hidden_params, so the happy path is unaffected. The new SimpleNamespace-based transparency tests still exercise the real attribution path.

additional_changes_made_in_scope: Added a crash-safety try/except around attribute_served_backend in _build_record (in-scope robustness for the log path; see blocker magicmock-hidden-params).
agent_verify_result: pass (68 passed in tests/test_enterprise_logger.py; ruff check + format --check clean on both scoped files)
next_step_for_orchestrator: Pack 0.5.0-OBS-log on branch obs-log at a9f9c8f; review, verify, merge
